title: Marvelous Irish Tofu Stew
description: A savory and festive Irish dish featuring marinated tofu, this stew is a delicious and satisfying meal for any time of day, made using a bain-marie for gentle heat and shojin-friendly ingredients for a compassionate diet.

ingredients.name: marinade
ingredients.notes: made with soy sauce and herbs

instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Prepare the marinade by whisking together soy sauce, herbs, and spices.
Add the cubed tofu to the marinade and let it sit for at least 30 minutes.
In a large pot, saute the chopped onions and carrots in a little bit of oil until they are tender.
Add the chopped potatoes, vegetable broth, tomato paste, thyme, and rosemary to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let it simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the marinated tofu to the pot and stir gently.
Transfer the pot to a bain-marie and let it cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
